generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) providing live current measurements from the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring motor shaft angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder measuring gearbox output angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueDerivedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived torque sensor computing torque from current and motor parameters."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocityDerivedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity sensor calculating velocity from angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationDerivedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration sensor calculating angular acceleration from velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueDerivedSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocityDerivedSensor
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationDerivedSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor current I_M transmitted via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angle from motor encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox output angle from secondary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque values calculated from current and motor parameters."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity values."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration values."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker transporting live sensor streams from the robot to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationDashboardService, ModelParameterUpdateService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment executing simulation models of motor, gearwheel and gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelParameterUpdateService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool providing structural and behavioral block diagrams for the robot axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelParameterUpdateService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell representing the robot axis as a digital asset."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard visualizing measured vs. simulated data and allowing operator interaction."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of gearbox friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous)."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, MotionControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured and simulated data streams and interactive inspection."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑based update of motion control parameters using identified friction values."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateInsight, MotionControlAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extracted friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) fed back to the robot controller."
]

instance MotionControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of motion control algorithms based on identified friction to improve positional accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured vs. simulated data aiding operator decisions."
]

instance ParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated control parameters derived from identified friction improving motion control accuracy."
]

// C10: Models / Data
instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance CycloidalGearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox with integrated friction models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Friction model combining Coulomb and viscous friction components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model capturing velocity‑dependent friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model representing hysteresis effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for dynamic friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data‑calculation model deriving torque from current and motor parameters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance VelocityDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model calculating angular velocity from successive angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AccelerationDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model calculating angular acceleration from velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DataProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Processing component consuming input data traces and producing simulated and identified data traces."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool, MQTTBroker
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in a continuous, real‑time mode, ingesting sensor data as it is generated and updating friction estimates on‑line during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is realized as a purpose‑driven constellation comprising a Purpose (FrictionDerivation), an Asset (Mabi first axis), Sources (sensor streams via MQTT), Processing components (simulation and friction‑identification models), Models (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation), and Data Traces (measured and simulated torque/velocity series) that are linked and visualized in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow incorporates engineering models (SysML structural model) representing the designed system and operates on live operational data, thus covering both the design (as‑built) and operated stages of the physical system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability is ensured by linking each data point to its source and processing model. Friction models are validated by comparing simulated torque/velocity outputs against measured reference traces, enabling multi‑physics‑aware identification and continuous validation during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol. The Asset Administration Shell (AAS) is employed to encapsulate asset metadata and interface definitions."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation follows Industry 4.0 standards such as Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset representation, uses the MQTT communication standard for data exchange, and employs SysML and MATLAB/Simulink, which are established engineering standards."
]
